prioritizePerformanceOverAccuracy.description: Configures the performance of the TypescriptChecker. Setting this to false results in a slower, but more accurate result.

experimentalNativePreview.description: Enable experimental support for type checking with the native TypeScript compiler preview (TypeScript 7). Requires TypeScript 7 to be installed under the "typescript7" alias: `npm install --save-dev typescript7@npm:typescript@latest`. Note: project references (--build mode) are not supported (yet) in this mode and mutants are always checked one-by-one (the "prioritizePerformanceOverAccuracy" option is ignored).
